thread.title: Patsy Ayala Elected To Santa Clarita City Council, District 1
thread.title_full: Patsy Ayala Elected To Santa Clarita City Council, District 1

author: KHTS Newsroom
title: Patsy Ayala Elected To Santa Clarita City Council, District 1
text:
Patsy Ayala has won the race to represent District 1 for the Santa Clarita Valley City Council. Ayala’s victory is a reflection of her deep connection to the community, her vision for economic prosperity, and her commitment to creating opportunities for all residents.
“I’m thankful for the trust the people of Santa Clarita have given me,” said Ayala. “This city has provided me with professional opportunities and has been the best place to raise my family. I’m ready to work for economic prosperity for our families and opportunities for our residents. I want to continue on this course and strengthen the future of our city.”
Ayala’s campaign focused on fostering economic growth, maintaining safe neighborhoods, and ensuring Santa Clarita remains a welcoming and thriving community for generations to come.
Her dedication to public service and her proven ability to unite people around shared goals resonated with voters throughout District One, which includes Newhall and Canyon Country.
As a longtime resident and active community leader, Ayala is committed to enhancing the quality of life for all Santa Clarita families.
Her focus will include promoting smart economic development, supporting small businesses, and ensuring local government remains responsive to the needs of the people.
Ayala’s election marks a new chapter for District 1, and she is eager to get to work for the benefit of the City she holds so dear.
For more information or to contact Ayala’s office, please visit PatsyAyala.com or contact information.

KHTS FM 98.1 and AM 1220 is Santa Clarita’s only local radio station. KHTS mixes in a combination of news, traffic, sports, and features along with your favorite adult contemporary hits. Santa Clarita news and features are delivered throughout the day over our airwaves, on our website and through a variety of social media platforms. Our KHTS national award-winning daily news briefs are now read daily by 34,000+ residents. A vibrant member of the Santa Clarita community, the KHTS broadcast signal reaches all of the Santa Clarita Valley and parts of the high desert communities located in the Antelope Valley. The station streams its talk shows over the web, reaching a potentially worldwide audience. Follow @KHTSRadio on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/khtsradio/), [Twitter](https://twitter.com/khtsradio), and [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/khtsradio/).
